primary.$description: Primary theme color. Main brand color for primary CTAs, links, and key interactive elements. Use for primary buttons, active navigation, focus states. Bootstrap's --bs-primary maps to blue-500. Ensures consistent brand expression across all touchpoints. Verify 4.5:1 contrast on backgrounds.

secondary.$description: Secondary theme color. Supporting UI elements, secondary actions, and muted emphasis. Use for secondary buttons, subtle badges, disabled state text. Bootstrap's --bs-secondary maps to gray-600. Provides visual hierarchy below primary actions. Meets WCAG AA for text.

success.$description: Success theme color. Positive feedback, confirmations, and successful operations. Use for success messages, checkmarks, positive badges, form validation. Bootstrap's --bs-success maps to green-500. Universal indicator of positive outcomes. Ensure 4.5:1 with backgrounds.

info.$description: Info theme color. Informational content, tips, and neutral notifications. Use for info alerts, help text, tooltips, neutral badges. Bootstrap's --bs-info maps to cyan-500. Communicates helpful information without urgency. Maintain contrast standards.

warning.$description: Warning theme color. Cautions, warnings, and important notices requiring attention. Use for warning alerts, pending states, cautionary badges. Bootstrap's --bs-warning maps to yellow-500. May require dark text overlay for accessibility. Test contrast carefully.

danger.$description: Danger theme color. Errors, destructive actions, and critical alerts. Use for error messages, delete buttons, critical alerts, form errors. Bootstrap's --bs-danger maps to red-500. Universal indicator of risk or problems. Ensure strong contrast.

light.$description: Light theme color. Light backgrounds, subtle surfaces, and low-emphasis elements. Use for page backgrounds, card backgrounds, light UI surfaces. Bootstrap's --bs-light maps to gray-100. Provides subtle separation. Use with dark text (700+).

dark.$description: Dark theme color. Dark backgrounds, strong surfaces, and high-emphasis elements. Use for page backgrounds, card backgrounds, and dark UI surfaces. Bootstrap's --bs-dark maps to gray-900. Provides strong contrast. Use with light text (100–300).
